title: RBI (Small Finance Banks – Credit Facilities) Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised)
description:
RBI introduced detailed rules on loans against eligible securities, including LTV limits and collateral norms. The amendment strengthens risk monitoring and restricts high-risk lending practices.
The post RBI (Small Finance Banks – Credit Facilities) Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) appeared first on TaxGuru.
